highlights.text: Singapore City (2N) → Sentosa Island (2N) family expedition
Marina Bay glamour & Gardens by the Bay
Ultra-luxury Sentosa resort with sunset beaches

itinerary.title: Singapore & Sentosa Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Marina Bay • Gardens by the Bay • Sentosa • Universal Studios • Adventure Cove
itinerary.overview: Discover the vibrant heart of Singapore and the island excitement of Sentosa with TRAGUIN's curated family holiday. Perfect balance of high-energy city exploration and luxury resort leisure — from Marina Bay and Gardens by the Bay to Universal Studios and Adventure Cove.
itinerary.seo_title: SG-002 | Singapore & Sentosa Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Singapore family package (SG-002): Marina Bay, Gardens by the Bay, Sentosa resort, Universal Studios, and Adventure Cove.

highlights.text: Gardens by the Bay Cloud Forest & Flower Dome

days.title: Arrival & Marina Bay Glamour
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. Private transfer to premium city hotel. Evening at Marina Bay experiencing the iconic light show.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP airport reception, Marina Bay light show
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Gardens by the Bay Exploration
days.description: Explore futuristic Gardens by the Bay including Cloud Forest and Flower Dome — iconic modern Singapore sightseeing.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Gardens by the Bay, Cloud Forest, Flower Dome

days.title: Sentosa Island Resort Transit
days.description: Transfer to Sentosa Island. Check into ultra-luxury family resort. Leisure time, vibrant sandy beaches, and stunning sunset views.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Transfer to Sentosa Island resort
Overnight Stay: Sentosa Island (Ultra-Luxury Family Resort)

days.title: Universal Studios & Adventure Cove
days.description: Full day at Universal Studios Singapore and Adventure Cove Waterpark — perfect for family fun and unforgettable memories.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Universal Studios Singapore, Adventure Cove Waterpark
Overnight Stay: Sentosa Island (Ultra-Luxury Family Resort)

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final breakfast before TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium Singapore-Sentosa family experience.

inclusions.text: 04 Nights in premium family hotels across Singapore City and Sentosa
Marina Bay, Gardens by the Bay, Universal Studios, and Adventure Cove
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and Singapore entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
